message:
revert(config): restore TUI effects and ambient defaults to enabled

Re-enable tui_effects=true and tui_ambient="subtle" as the defaults.
The earlier change to disable them was premature — the 10fps tick rate
and Bayesian diff improvements already resolved the flashing and CPU
issues that motivated disabling effects. With those fixes in place,
the ambient effects render smoothly without excessive terminal writes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
